case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE AND CASUALTY INSURANCE CORP. et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT GRANTED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY; SUMMARY JUDGMENT ENTERED IN ERROR, THE BAIL FORFEITURE IS SET ASIDE AND THE BOND IS REINSTATED JUDGMENT OF AUG-03-2000 SET ASIDE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE AND CASUALTY INSURANCE CORP. AL GRAF BAIL BONDS $30,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $30,083.00
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE AND CASUALTY INSURANCE CORP. AL GRAF BAIL BONDS
